name: Lexecon Inc. v. Milberg Weiss Bershad Hynes & Lerach
summary: Held that an MDL transferee court lacked authority to conduct trial, requiring vacatur of the judgment and return to the original forum despite no argument that one federal court was better than another.
significance: Justice Gorsuch raised it as a case where a judgment was vacated and sent back because the plaintiff's choice of forum was denied, even though both forums were federal courts.
